underlying_signals.label: Stage trace first
underlying_signals.reason: No strong heuristic matched. Add stage-boundary traces around the detected family and compare the first divergent stage.

fix_suggestions.label: Sprite renderer
fix_suggestions.reason: Sprite, transform, or path-data mismatches usually come from the SVG sprite renderer rather than parser logic.
